settings.custom_liquid:
How to Apply Press-On Nails in 4 Simple Steps

Applying ZUVE press-on nails takes under 10 minutes and requires zero nail experience. Follow these four steps for a flawless, salon-quality result every time.

1

Prep Your Nails

Push back your cuticles using the included cuticle pusher. Clean your nail surface thoroughly with the included prep pad — this removes oils and residue that can shorten wear time. Allow your nails to dry completely before moving to the next step. Do not apply moisturiser or hand cream before application.

Pro tip: The cleaner and drier your nails, the longer your ZUVE nails will stay on.

2

Find Your Perfect Size

Each ZUVE set includes 30 nails in 15 different sizes (2 of every size). Hold each nail over your natural nail without sticking it — the nail should cover your nail plate from side wall to side wall without overlapping your skin. If you're between sizes, choose the larger size and gently file the edges for a perfect custom fit.

Pro tip: Lay out all 10 nails before sticking any — this makes the process faster.

3

Peel & Press

Peel the protective film from the adhesive tab on the back of the nail. Starting from your cuticle line, align the nail and press down firmly — working from the cuticle toward the tip. Press and hold for 10 full seconds, applying firm, even pressure. For maximum hold, press from the centre outward to eliminate any air bubbles.

Pro tip: For longer-lasting wear (up to 14 days), use nail glue instead of adhesive tabs — available separately.

4

You're Done — Enjoy Your Nails!

Repeat for all 10 fingers. The entire process takes under 10 minutes. Your ZUVE press-on nails are ready to wear immediately — no drying time, no UV lamp, no wait. To extend wear time, avoid water for 1 hour after application and wear gloves while washing dishes.

How to Remove ZUVE Press-On Nails (Without Damage)

  1. Soak your nails in warm, soapy water for 5–10 minutes until the adhesive softens.
  2. Gently wiggle the nail from the side to loosen it — never pull straight up.
  3. Once loose, slide the nail off gently from the side.
  4. Clean any adhesive residue from the nail with the included prep pad.
  5. Store the nails in the included case for reuse.

Never use acetone — it will damage the soft gel finish of your ZUVE nails.

Shop ZUVE Nail Sets →
